narrative:
Monterey Twp. township has 1,477 registered voters, with 51.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.8 percentage points.
